name: Arihant Superstructures Limited
summary: Arihant Superstructures Limited operates as a real estate development company in India. The company's operations comprise various aspects of real estate development comprising identification and acquisition of land, planning, execution, construction, and marketing of projects. Its projects include residential properties, studios, 1 BHK flats, 2 BHK flats, 3 BHK flats, 4 BHK flats, apartments, and lands. The company was formerly known as Shaktiman Constructions Limited and changed its name to Arihant Superstructures Ltd. in August 2009. Arihant Superstructures Limited was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Navi Mumbai, India.
